text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One evening, while Mejiro Bright and I are
strolling around town...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Oooh, what's going on over there? There are
quite a lot of people. Is it some kind of
ceremony?

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Step right up and try your luck with our New
Year's raffle! This year's grand prize is a hot
spring vacation for two!

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
First-prize winners get a deluxe carrot hamburger
steak! Second-prize winners get a bushel of
carrots! And third-prize winners can take home a
single carrot!

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Don't let this opportunity pass you by! You there,
the quiet Umamusume in the back! Care to give it
a try?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Oh, may I? I would gladly.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
But... pardon me, Trainer. Don't we need tickets
to try the raffle?
choice_data_list: I've got the five we need right here.
I've got the five we need right here.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Oh my, I should have known you'd come
prepared. Let's try our luck five times, then.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Actually, we can only try once, but I decide to
keep that to myself for now.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Now then, Trainer. Place your hand on mine and
let's spin this mini Ferris wheel.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Annnd... spiiiiin. ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She turns the handle in super slow motion, but
eventually, a ball falls out...

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Holy mackerel! We've got ourselves a grand-prize
winner! Come and get the ticket for your hot
spring vacation! Congratulations!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Goodness. What an incredible turn of events.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
To think we would win a hot spring... I don't own
one myself, but I have made use of the one at the
Mejiro estate before.
choice_data_list: Well, it's not a hot spring. It's a vacation to a hot spring.
Well, it's not a hot spring. It's a vacation to a hot spring.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A hot spring isn't something you could win as a
grand prize. Still, what we did get is pretty
incredible.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
A hot spring vacation. ♪ I think it would be in our
best interest to go as soon as we can, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
If we begin preparing once we arrive back on
campus... Let's see... I believe I will be ready by...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: January of next year.
choice_data_list: Wow, that's a long prep time...
Wow, that's a long prep time...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Is it? But it's only natural that it would take so
long, considering I'll be racing during the same
period.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
That sounds about right for Mejiro Bright. If she's
doing two things at once, it'll take a whole year.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Hmm. Do you have any plans a year from now?
choice_data_list: I don't think so.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
That means we can go on this trip together. What
a relief.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Could you hold onto the coupon until then? I'm
looking forward to a warm, relaxing hot spring
bath next year.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her excitement is written all over her face. Mejiro
Bright's cheeks grow pink, as if she's already
entered the hot water.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Looks like we have another first-prize winner!
Congratulations! You get one deluxe carrot
hamburger steak!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Oh my, it looks scrumptious! Can you believe how
big it is?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, would you entrust me with the task of
cooking it?
choice_data_list: ...Can you?
...Can you?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
I can. For it to come out best, you have to cook it
long and slow for the heat to properly pass
through.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
In other words, I have the perfect personality for
preparing it.
choice_data_list: Tell me how you'll actually cook it.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
That is the question. I'll lightly heat up a frying
pan and then let the hamburger steak cook on a
low flame...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: For about two hours. ♪
choice_data_list: That'll burn it!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Oh, will it? I'm not so adept at precision...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She decides to leave the cooking duties to me.
Back at Tracen Academy, we later enjoy a tender
hamburger steak.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
We got a second-prize winner! It's your lucky day!
You're going home with a bushel of carrots!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Oh dearie. It'll take hours to peel all these.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
However, I did do a splendid job of peeling
daikon radishes before.
choice_data_list: Ah, so you're a peeling pro.
Ah, so you're a peeling pro.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
I'm not sure I'd go that far, but I managed to cut
the skin nice and thin, I believe.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
In the end, the whole daikon radish became one
loooong sheet of skin.
choice_data_list: That's incredible!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her pace may be slow, but you could never call
her untalented.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
If you'd like, I'm sure I could also peel the carrots
the same way...
choice_data_list: Don't worry about it. We can just eat them as is.
Don't worry about it. We can just eat them as is.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It would be a waste of time to peel them all.
Instead, we just boil them and eat them that way.
I've never tasted sweeter carrots.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Would you lookie here! You've won the third
prize! Here's your carrot!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
One carrot... You have my apologies. We were
unable to draw a decent prize because of me.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Since there's only one, I can't help but want to
eat it right away.
choice_data_list: How about you eat it while we walk home?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
That won't work, I'm afraid. I'm not adept at
walking and chewing at the same time.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
I'm simply incapable. I always end up stopping in
place...
choice_data_list: How about we relax over there then?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Oh, this is a nice spot. We can even watch the sunset here.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Let's split the carrot, Trainer. Look, it's the same
color as the sun!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We nibble our halves of the carrot while watching
the sun set over the horizon. The carrot is
heartwarmingly sweet.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Ohhh, tough luck! Looks like you pulled a blank
one! Take this pack of tissues as a consolation
prize.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Sigh... Tissues. And there's barely any in here...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
You could go through a pack this size in no time.
Trainer, you agree, yes? We need more tissues?
choice_data_list: Uh, sure...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Then as an apology for such an unworthy prize, I
will have more sent to you from the Mejiro estate.
choice_data_list: Thanks. That would be helpful.
Thanks. That would be helpful.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: You'll receive one truckload.
choice_data_list: I don't need that many!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Is that so? But I don't know if any less would
compensate for my failure today...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She lowers her head apologetically. I can't believe
a little raffle could end on such a somber note...
